next_action: All 9 changes in p16-production-remediation are now complete. p16-c008 (production operations) was resolved this session: the user provided real access to the `ssr` AKS cluster (a standalone cluster, not `main`), and flint-forge was deployed there via the existing shared Envoy Gateway + letsencrypt-http01 cert-manager setup.
